title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP AC High Density, 5-Pack, PoE Not Included - Bazar
description: The product is fully functional and used at the exhibition. It may not contain complete accessories or original packaging Ubiquiti UniFi AC HD is 802.11ac UAP device. It is 4x4 MU-MIMO 2,4GHz and 5GHz Acess point with modulation speed up to 1722+800Mbps supporting 802.11/a/b/g/n/ac/ac-wave2. This UAP is designed for example offices, hotels, warehouses and thanks to high performance is suitable for places with high quantity of connected devices. UAP-AC-HD has two antenas for 2,4GHz band (4dBi) and two antennas for 5GHz band (3dBi) for range up to 122 meters. It full supports roaming for transmission of associated… Thanks to MU-MIMO (Multiple-User - Multiple-In - Multiple-Out) technology UAP AC-HD is able to communicate with several devices at the same time : 4 clients 1x1 2 clients 2x2 1 client 2x2 + 2 clients 1x1 1 client 3x3 + 1 client 1x1 UniFi APs doesn't have own web GUI and you manage them via UniFi Controller, which you can download on UBNT websites here: http://www.ubnt.com . Or you can manage UAP devices using UniFi Cloud Key which has UniFi Controller preinstalled. Additional benefit is fact that UniFi Controller software is free of costs and includes advanced functions without limitations Zero Handoff Roaming Wireless uplink Up to 8 SSID Detailed traffic stats Guest network Load balance Speed limitaions for each SSID (5) Device (5) Ceiling attach kit (5) Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 800 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 25 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 25 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 802.1w/PMF 2.4GHz MIMO 4 x 4 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at, 48V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 17 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 70 Weight [g] 700 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 48 Depth [mm] 220
